title: Worker
description: Represents an employee or contingent worker within the Workday Human Capital Management system, including personal data, employment information, and organizational assignments.

id.description: The unique Workday identifier for the worker

descriptor.description: The display name of the worker

workerID.description: The employee or contingent worker ID (e.g., EMP-001)

workerType.description: The type of worker (Employee or Contingent Worker)

businessTitle.description: The current business title of the worker

supervisoryOrganization.description: The supervisory organization to which the worker belongs

managementLevel.description: The management level of the worker

location.description: The work location of the worker

hireDate.description: The date the worker was hired

terminationDate.description: The date the worker was terminated, if applicable

position.description: The position the worker currently holds

jobProfile.description: The job profile associated with the worker's position

isActive.description: Whether the worker is currently active

ResourceReference.description: A reference to a Workday resource

id.description: The Workday ID of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: The display name of the referenced resource
